## How it was verified

<!-- How do you know it works? For numerical/DSP changes, note the fixture or ground truth you checked against. -->

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build:lib` succeeds
- [ ] Numerical changes are backed by a fixture in `tools/goldens/` (or N/A)
